types:type.name: auto_43604722-7c3e-4078-840a-459180b2672c_Input-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_43604722_7c3e_4078_840a_459180b2672c_Input_Payload = Array<{| foodId: Number, mode: "B" | "A", portionId: Number | Null, portionAmount: Number | Null, quantityG: Number | Null|}>

types:type.name: auto_43604722-7c3e-4078-840a-459180b2672c_Input-Attributes
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_43604722_7c3e_4078_840a_459180b2672c_Input_Attributes = {| clientCertificate?: {| publicKey?: {| |}, "type"?: String, encoded?: Binary |}, headers: {| |}, listenerPath: String, method: String, queryParams: {| |}, queryString: String, relativePath: String, remoteAddress: String, requestPath: String, requestUri: String, scheme: String, uriParams: {| userId: String |}, version: String, localAddress: String |}

types:type.name: auto_43604722-7c3e-4078-840a-459180b2672c_Input-Variables-request
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_43604722_7c3e_4078_840a_459180b2672c_Input_Variables_request = {| mealType: "lunch" | "snack" | "breakfast" | "dinner", consumedAt: String {"format": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX"}, items: Array<{ portionId?: Number, portionAmount?: Number, foodId: Number, quantityG?: Number, _?: Any } {"label": "MealItemInput", "description": "Input shape for a meal item. Mode A uses foodId plus portionId and portionAmount. Mode B uses foodId plus quantityG directly. Providing both modes or neither returns a 400."}> {"description": "One or more food items to include in this meal"} |}

types:type.name: auto_43604722-7c3e-4078-840a-459180b2672c_Output-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_43604722_7c3e_4078_840a_459180b2672c_Output_Payload = { mealId: String, loggedAt: String, mealType: "lunch" | "snack" | "breakfast" | "dinner", consumedAt: String, userId: String, items: Array<{ itemId: String, portionId?: Number | Null, loggedAt: String, portionAmount?: Number | Null, foodId: Number, quantityG: Number | Null, _?: Any } {"label": "MealItem", "description": "A single food item within a meal, populated after creation with generated IDs and computed quantity"}> {"description": "All non-deleted items belonging to this meal"}, _?: Any } {"description": "A meal record including all non-deleted items", "label": "Meal"}

types:type.name: auto_43604722-7c3e-4078-840a-459180b2672c_Output-Variables-request
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_43604722_7c3e_4078_840a_459180b2672c_Output_Variables_request = {| mealType: "lunch" | "snack" | "breakfast" | "dinner", consumedAt: String {"format": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX"}, items: Array<{ portionId?: Number, portionAmount?: Number, foodId: Number, quantityG?: Number, _?: Any } {"label": "MealItemInput", "description": "Input shape for a meal item. Mode A uses foodId plus portionId and portionAmount. Mode B uses foodId plus quantityG directly. Providing both modes or neither returns a 400."}> {"description": "One or more food items to include in this meal"} |}

types:type.name: auto_245fe212-f4f3-4f97-8bc8-fa8cd443db06_Input-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_245fe212_f4f3_4f97_8bc8_fa8cd443db06_Input_Payload = { mealId: String, loggedAt: String, mealType: "lunch" | "snack" | "breakfast" | "dinner", consumedAt: String, userId: String, items: Array<{ itemId: String, portionId?: Number | Null, loggedAt: String, portionAmount?: Number | Null, foodId: Number, quantityG: Number | Null, _?: Any } {"label": "MealItem", "description": "A single food item within a meal, populated after creation with generated IDs and computed quantity"}> {"description": "All non-deleted items belonging to this meal"}, _?: Any } {"description": "A meal record including all non-deleted items", "label": "Meal"}
